analyses.title: Cefazolin for Methicillin-Susceptible Bacteremia.
analyses.oneLineSummary: In adults with methicillin-susceptible bacteremia, cefazolin was noninferior to antistaphylococcal penicillins for 90-day mortality and caused significantly less acute kidney injury.
analyses.oneLineSummary_ko: 메티실린 감수성 균혈증 성인 환자에서 세파졸린은 90일 사망률 측면에서 항포도상구균 페니실린 대비 비열등하였으며, 급성 신손상 발생률은 유의하게 낮았습니다.
analyses.whyItMatters: For decades, infectious disease guidelines have debated whether cefazolin is as effective as antistaphylococcal penicillins (such as nafcillin, oxacillin, or flucloxacillin) for MSSA bacteremia due to concerns over the inoculum effect. This large, randomized controlled platform trial (SNAP) provides high-quality evidence that cefazolin is noninferior to antistaphylococcal penicillins and is safer, resulting in substantially less acute kidney injury.
analyses.whyItMatters_ko: 수십 년 동안 감염학 가이드라인은 MSSA 균혈증 치료에서 세파졸린이 접종원 효과(inoculum effect)로 인해 항포도상구균 페니실린(나프실린, 옥사실린, 플루클록사실린 등)만큼 효과적인지에 대해 논쟁해 왔습니다. 이 대규모 무작위 대조군 플랫폼 연구(SNAP)는 세파졸린이 항포도상구균 페니실린에 비해 비열등할 뿐만 아니라 급성 신손상을 크게 줄여 더 안전하다는 고품질 근거를 제공합니다.
analyses.clinicalQuestion: Is cefazolin noninferior to antistaphylococcal penicillins (flucloxacillin or cloxacillin) for 90-day mortality in adults with penicillin-resistant, methicillin-susceptible bacteremia?
analyses.clinicalQuestion_ko: 페니실린 내성, 메티실린 감수성 균혈증 성인 환자에서 세파졸린은 항포도상구균 페니실린(플루클록사실린 또는 클록사실린)과 비교하여 90일 사망률 측면에서 비열등한가?

pico.outcome: All-cause mortality at 90 days and acute kidney injury within 14 days

pico_ko.population: 페니실린 내성, 메티실린 감수성 균혈증을 앓고 있는 성인 환자
pico_ko.outcome: 90일 전원인 사망률 및 14일 이내 급성 신손상 발생률

detailedPico.population: Adult patients with penicillin-resistant, methicillin-susceptible bacteremia enrolled in the SNAP platform trial.
detailedPico.population_ko: 진행 중인 SNAP 플랫폼 임상시험에 등록된 페니실린 내성, 메티실린 감수성 균혈증 성인 환자.
detailedPico.countrySetting: Multicenter, international trial (specific countries not reported in abstract)
detailedPico.countrySetting_ko: 다국가, 다기관 임상시험 (구체적인 국가 목록은 초록에 보고되지 않음)
detailedPico.intervention: Cefazolin (dosing and route of administration not reported in abstract)
detailedPico.intervention_ko: 세파졸린 (구체적인 용량 및 투여 경로는 초록에 보고되지 않음)
detailedPico.comparator: Antistaphylococcal penicillin (flucloxacillin or cloxacillin; dosing not reported in abstract)
detailedPico.comparator_ko: 항포도상구균 페니실린 (플루클록사실린 또는 클록사실린, 구체적인 용량은 보고되지 않음)

outcomes.label: Primary Outcome
outcomes.outcome: Death from any cause within 90 days after enrollment
outcomes.outcome_ko: 등록 후 90일 이내 모든 원인으로 인한 사망
outcomes.result: 15.0% (97/645) in the cefazolin group vs. 17.0% (109/642) in the antistaphylococcal-penicillin group
outcomes.statistics: Adjusted odds ratio (aOR) 0.81 (95% credible interval [CrI], 0.59 to 1.12); posterior probability of noninferiority = 99.2%; posterior probability of superiority = 89.8%
outcomes.interpretation: Cefazolin met the prespecified noninferiority threshold (adjusted odds ratio <1.2) for 90-day mortality, with a very high posterior probability of noninferiority (99.2%).
outcomes.interpretation_ko: 세파졸린은 90일 사망률에 대해 사전에 설정된 비열등성 기준(조정 오즈비 <1.2)을 충족했으며, 비열등할 사후 확률이 99.2%로 매우 높았습니다.

outcomes.label: Secondary Outcome
outcomes.result: 13.9% (92/660) in the cefazolin group vs. 19.6% (127/648) in the antistaphylococcal-penicillin group
outcomes.statistics: Adjusted odds ratio (aOR) 0.67 (95% credible interval [CrI], 0.50 to 0.89); posterior probability of superiority = 99.7%
outcomes.interpretation: Cefazolin therapy was associated with a clinically and statistically meaningful reduction in the risk of acute kidney injury compared to antistaphylococcal penicillins.
outcomes.interpretation_ko: 세파졸린 치료는 항포도상구균 페니실린에 비해 급성 신손상 위험을 임상적 및 통계적으로 유의하게 감소시켰습니다.

keyFindings: Cefazolin is noninferior to antistaphylococcal penicillins (flucloxacillin or cloxacillin) for 90-day mortality in adults with methicillin-susceptible bacteremia (15.0% vs. 17.0%, aOR 0.81, 95% CrI 0.59 to 1.12).
Cefazolin therapy resulted in a significantly lower incidence of acute kidney injury within 14 days compared to antistaphylococcal penicillins (13.9% vs. 19.6%, aOR 0.67, 95% CrI 0.50 to 0.89).
The Bayesian posterior probability of noninferiority for mortality was 99.2%, and the posterior probability of superiority for renal safety was 99.7%.
keyFindings_ko: 메티실린 감수성 균혈증 성인 환자 치료에서 세파졸린은 항포도상구균 페니실린(플루클록사실린 또는 클록사실린) 대비 90일 사망률 측면에서 비열등했습니다 (15.0% 대 17.0%, 조정 오즈비 0.81, 95% 신용구간 0.59 ~ 1.12).
세파졸린 치료군은 항포도상구균 페니실린군에 비해 14일 이내 급성 신손상 발생률이 유의하게 낮았습니다 (13.9% 대 19.6%, 조정 오즈비 0.67, 95% 신용구간 0.50 ~ 0.89).
사망률에 대한 베이지안 비열등성 사후 확률은 99.2%였으며, 신장 안전성에 대한 우월성 사후 확률은 99.7%였습니다.
analyses.conclusion: In patients with methicillin-susceptible bacteremia, cefazolin was noninferior to flucloxacillin or cloxacillin with respect to 90-day mortality and was associated with a lower incidence of acute kidney injury.
analyses.conclusion_ko: 메티실린 감수성 균혈증 환자에서 세파졸린은 90일 사망률 측면에서 플루클록사실린 또는 클록사실린에 비열등하였고, 급성 신손상 발생률은 유의하게 낮추었습니다.
analyses.clinicalTakeaway: For adult patients with MSSA bacteremia, cefazolin should be considered the preferred first-line therapy over antistaphylococcal penicillins (like flucloxacillin or cloxacillin). It offers equivalent survival outcomes while significantly lowering the risk of acute kidney injury, which has been a major drawback of penicillin therapy. This trial addresses long-standing clinician anxiety regarding the inoculum effect of cefazolin in deep-seated infections.
analyses.clinicalTakeaway_ko: MSSA 균혈증 성인 환자에서 세파졸린은 항포도상구균 페니실린(플루클록사실린 또는 클록사실린)보다 우선적으로 고려되어야 하는 1차 치료제입니다. 페니실린 치료의 주요 단점이었던 급성 신손상 위험을 유의하게 낮추면서도 동등한 생존율을 제공합니다. 이번 임상시험은 심부 감염에서 세파졸린의 접종원 효과에 대한 임상 의사들의 오랜 우려를 해소해 줍니다.
analyses.limitations: The trial was open-label, which could introduce bias in patient management. The active comparator was limited to flucloxacillin or cloxacillin; thus, extrapolation to centers primarily using nafcillin or oxacillin, while biochemically similar, remains indirect. Detail regarding the clinical source of bacteremia (e.g., endocarditis, osteomyelitis) and exact dosing regimens were not provided in the abstract.
analyses.limitations_ko: 본 임상시험은 공개 라벨(open-label)로 진행되어 임상적 처치 과정에서 편향이 개입되었을 가능성이 있습니다. 대조군이 플루클록사실린 또는 클록사실린으로 제한되었기 때문에, 생화학적으로는 유사하나 나프실린이나 옥사실린을 주로 사용하는 의료기관으로 결과를 바로 대입하기에는 제한이 있습니다. 균혈증의 원인 병소(예: 심내막염, 골수염 등) 및 구체적인 투여 용량에 대한 세부 데이터는 초록에서 제공되지 않았습니다.
analyses.edIcuApplicability: Highly applicable. Emergency and ICU clinicians frequently manage patients with positive blood cultures growing Gram-positive cocci. Once MSSA is identified, transitioning patients to cefazolin instead of antistaphylococcal penicillins represents a high-value clinical choice that reduces nephrotoxicity in critically ill patients without compromising mortality outcomes.
analyses.edIcuApplicability_ko: 매우 높은 적용 가능성을 가집니다. 응급실 및 중환자실 의료진은 그람 양성 균혈증 환자를 빈번하게 치료합니다. MSSA로 확인된 후, 환자의 치료제를 항포도상구균 페니실린 대신 세파졸린으로 전환하는 것은 중증 환자에서 사망률 저하 없이 신독성을 낮출 수 있는 매우 유용한 임상적 선택입니다.
analysisNotes: The SNAP trial is a landmark international Bayesian adaptive platform trial addressing a long-standing infectious disease controversy.
Demonstrates noninferiority for mortality with very high certainty (99.2% probability) and clear superiority for renal safety (13.9% AKI vs 19.6% AKI).
Highly relevant for emergency medicine and critical care transitions of care as definitive culture data returns.

paper.title: Cefazolin for Methicillin-Susceptible Bacteremia.
paper.abstract:
BACKGROUND: bacteremia is associated with high mortality. Whether cefazolin or an antistaphylococcal penicillin should be preferred for the treatment of methicillin-susceptible bacteremia is unclear.
METHODS: In an ongoing international Bayesian adaptive platform trial, we conducted an open-label, randomized comparison of cefazolin with an antistaphylococcal penicillin (flucloxacillin or cloxacillin) in adult patients with penicillin-resistant, methicillin-susceptible bacteremia. The primary outcome, which was evaluated with a hierarchical Bayesian logistic-regression model, was death from any cause within 90 days after enrollment in the platform. We assessed the posterior probability of the noninferiority of cefazolin to flucloxacillin or cloxacillin (with the criterion for noninferiority prespecified as an adjusted odds ratio of <1.2, which approximates an absolute difference in mortality of <2.5 percentage points if mortality in the antistaphylococcal-penicillin group is 15%), as well as the posterior probability of superiority (with the criterion of an adjusted odds ratio of <1.0). Secondary safety outcomes included the development of acute kidney injury within 14 days.
RESULTS: This domain of the ongoing trial was conducted between February 17, 2022, and August 7, 2024, by which time the criterion for noninferiority had been met. Mortality at 90 days among adults who could be evaluated was 15.0% (97 deaths among 645 patients) in the cefazolin group and 17.0% (109 deaths among 642 patients) in the antistaphylococcal-penicillin group (adjusted odds ratio, 0.81; 95% credible interval, 0.59 to 1.12; probability of noninferiority, 99.2%; probability of superiority, 89.8%). Acute kidney injury occurred in 92 of 660 patients (13.9%) in the cefazolin group, as compared with 127 of 648 (19.6%) in the antistaphylococcal-penicillin group (adjusted odds ratio, 0.67; 95% credible interval, 0.50 to 0.89; probability of superiority, 99.7%).
CONCLUSIONS: In patients with methicillin-susceptible bacteremia, cefazolin was noninferior to flucloxacillin or cloxacillin with respect to 90-day mortality and was associated with a lower incidence of acute kidney injury. (Funded by the National Health and Medical Research Council and others; SNAP ClinicalTrials.gov number, NCT05137119.).
paper.journal: The New England journal of medicine

reasons: journal boost: The New England journal of medicine

contextSource.reason: No PMCID available for open full-text fetch

selected.rationale_ko: 이 연구는 MSSA 균혈증 환자에서 세파졸린과 항포도상구균 페니실린의 효능 및 안전성을 비교한 다기관 무작위 대조시험(RCT)으로, 세계 최고 권위의 의학 저널인 NEJM에 발표되었습니다. 중환자실 및 응급실에서 흔히 접하는 위중한 감염병인 MSSA 균혈증의 최적의 일차 약제 선택에 대해 직접적이고 실천 가능한 임상적 근거를 제공하므로 임상적 가치가 매우 높습니다.

notes_ko: NEJM에 발표된 MSSA 균혈증 치료용 세파졸린 대 페니실린 비교 RCT는 높은 학술적 가치와 실제 임상 적용 가능성을 가지고 있어 오늘의 탑 논문으로 선정하였습니다.
